name: design-constraint-validator
description: Mathematical constraint validator for design systems — ensuring consistency, accessibility, and logical coherence

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
scripts.release:notes: npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m "docs(changelog): update"
scripts.release:patch:
npm version patch && git push && git push --tags && echo '
✅ Tag pushed. CI (.github/workflows/publish.yml) will build, publish, and verify the version on npm — no manual npm publish needed. Watch the Actions run.'
scripts.release:minor:
npm version minor && git push && git push --tags && echo '
✅ Tag pushed. CI (.github/workflows/publish.yml) will build, publish, and verify the version on npm — no manual npm publish needed. Watch the Actions run.'
scripts.release:major:
npm version major && git push && git push --tags && echo '
✅ Tag pushed. CI (.github/workflows/publish.yml) will build, publish, and verify the version on npm — no manual npm publish needed. Watch the Actions run.'
scripts.demo: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');const dir='../designLab-DEMO';if(!fs.existsSync(dir)){console.error('Demo repo not found at ../designLab-DEMO. Clone it next to this repo to run npm run demo.');process.exit(1)}const r=cp.spawnSync('npm',['run','dev'],{cwd:dir,stdio:'inherit',shell:true});process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status)"
scripts.demo:build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');const dir='../designLab-DEMO';if(!fs.existsSync(dir)){console.error('Demo repo not found at ../designLab-DEMO. Clone it next to this repo to run npm run demo:build.');process.exit(1)}const r=cp.spawnSync('npm',['run','build'],{cwd:dir,stdio:'inherit',shell:true});process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status)"
scripts.demo:v2: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');const dir='designLab-v2';if(!fs.existsSync(dir)){console.error('Demo repo not found at designLab-v2. Add it inside this repo to run npm run demo:v2.');process.exit(1)}const r=cp.spawnSync('npm',['run','dev'],{cwd:dir,stdio:'inherit',shell:true});process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status)"
scripts.demo:v2:build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');const dir='designLab-v2';if(!fs.existsSync(dir)){console.error('Demo repo not found at designLab-v2. Add it inside this repo to run npm run demo:v2:build.');process.exit(1)}const r=cp.spawnSync('npm',['run','build'],{cwd:dir,stdio:'inherit',shell:true});process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status)"

author: Cseperke Papp
